text.zh: 谱聚类 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Spectral Clustering is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: 谱聚类把分组重新表述为图问题。样本成为节点，相似度成为带权边，图矩阵的特征向量揭示低维结构，使原本困难的切分更容易分离。
text.en: Spectral clustering reframed grouping as a graph problem. Points become nodes, similarities become weighted edges, and eigenvectors of graph matrices reveal low-dimensional structure where difficult cuts become easier to separate.
